The IOC summary shows no network activity (0 IPs, 0 domains, 0 HTTP), which is interesting given the heavy process spawning and file dropping. The sample dropped 2 files and created 127 processes. I n

The process activity shows an extremely high number of processes created (127), many with random names in SysWOW64 and System32 directories. This is characteristic of a 'process flooding' or 'process
The registry changes show no persistence keys, which is interesting given the initial overview mentioned some shell folder modifications. The lack of network activity (0 IPs, 0 domains) suggests this
